hero.title: Your child bilingual in 1 year — a childhood where English is natural.
hero.titlePart2: a childhood where English is natural.
hero.subtitle: Rise Up Kids engages children in meaningful English experiences, within a structured and progressive framework that integrates smart technology, immersive content, and real human teaching. It is in childhood that language becomes natural, and English is lived with understanding, expression, and confidence for life.

experience.title: What's Included
experience.subtitle: Immersive experiences where children experience English naturally, progressively, and confidently.
items: Guided activities for interaction and consolidation of comprehension
Live classes with teachers trained in the Rise Up Kids method
Structured progression of English from comprehension to speaking
Sending of speaking activities with teacher feedback
Storytime: lived English stories with visual support and guided language
Exclusive Rise Up Kids tool for children to play with English
Monitoring of the child's progress throughout the journey
Clarification of parents' doubts about the use of the program (24 hours a day, except Sundays)
Digital materials for hands-on activities included.
Points and rewards system throughout the learning journey.

items.question: From what age can my child start?
items.answer:
Rise Up Kids is ideal for children aged 5 to 13, a phase of high openness to language development.

Children aged 4 can also participate with close parental supervision.

items.question: How much time per day is needed?
items.answer:
What matters most in Rise Up Kids is frequent contact with English, not long sessions.

Most children interact with the language for about 20 to 30 minutes on days they use it, with at least 5 weekly contacts, through videos, activities, or live classes.

This frequency allows English to become natural over time.

items.question: My child doesn't know any English. Is it suitable?
items.answer:
Yes. Rise Up Kids was designed especially for beginners.

The child starts with comprehension, with visual support and guided language, and progresses naturally to speaking, at their own pace.

items.question: How do I track progress?
items.answer: Parents follow the child's progress throughout the journey through completed activities, participation, and pedagogical guidance when applicable.

items.question: Is the physical box available for my region?
items.answer:
The physical box is an optional add-on currently available for families in Brazil at enrollment.

It is prepared according to the start of the child's journey and is part of the program's pedagogical experience; it is not sold separately.

cta.title: Don't let the development window pass
cta.description: Childhood is the most powerful time to build language, confidence, and curiosity. Give your child the opportunity to grow up bilingual with joy, security, and consistency.

footer.subtitle: A childhood where English is natural, fun, and unforgettable.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.introP1After: platform values the privacy and protection of data of participating families and children. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect personal information in the context of the Rise Up Kids educational platform.
privacyPolicy.introP2: By using the platform, you agree to this Policy.
privacyPolicy.s1P1: Rise Up Kids processes personal data in accordance with applicable data protection laws, including Brazil's Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD), the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), and international children's data protection standards such as the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA), when applicable.
privacyPolicy.s1P2: Data processing is limited, proportionate, and adequate to the educational purposes of the program, with special attention to the protection of children's data and to acting under the responsibility of parents or legal guardians.
privacyPolicy.s2P1: Rise Up Kids acts as the controller of personal data processed in the context of the platform. When we use technical providers to operate the service, they act as data processors, following instructions and adequate security standards.
privacyPolicy.s3P1: We may collect information provided by the responsible party, such as:
s3List: Payment information, processed by a secure payment provider
Child's name and age, or age range
Platform usage data, such as progress, completed activities and educational interactions
Content voluntarily submitted by the family, such as speaking activities sent for feedback
privacyPolicy.s3P2: We collect only the data necessary to provide, operate and improve the educational experience.
privacyPolicy.s4P1: Rise Up Kids is an educational service intended for children, used under the responsibility and authorization of parents or legal guardians, in compliance with applicable child protection legislation.
privacyPolicy.s4P2: Children's data is limited to what is necessary for educational personalization, such as name, age or age range, and progress in activities.
privacyPolicy.s4P3: We do not ask children to provide contact information or sensitive data. If improper submission of personal data by children is identified, it may be removed upon request by the responsible party.
privacyPolicy.s5P1: Personal data may be used to:
s5List: Personalize the experience according to age and level
Improve the platform and fix issues
Comply with legal obligations and prevent fraud
privacyPolicy.s6P1: We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, including:
privacyPolicy.s6P2: No system is entirely immune to risks, but we adopt ongoing practices for adequate protection of information.
privacyPolicy.s7P1: Rise Up Kids does not sell personal data.
privacyPolicy.s7P2: We may share data only when necessary for operation of the service, such as with:
s7List: Essential technical tools for platform operation
privacyPolicy.s7P3: Sharing occurs only to the extent necessary and with adequate protection.
privacyPolicy.s7P4: We may also disclose data when required by law or competent authority.
privacyPolicy.s8P1: We may use cookies and similar technologies to:
privacyPolicy.s8P2: Users can manage cookies in the browser. Some features may not work correctly without essential cookies.
privacyPolicy.s9P1: We retain personal data for as long as necessary to:
s9List: Comply with legal and tax obligations
privacyPolicy.s9P2: After that period, data may be deleted or anonymized, as applicable.
privacyPolicy.s10P1: The legal guardian may request, when applicable:
privacyPolicy.s11P1: Rise Up Kids may use providers and infrastructure located in different countries. When international data transfer occurs, we adopt measures to maintain adequate levels of protection and security, in accordance with applicable legislation.
privacyPolicy.s12P1: We may send communications related to the service, such as:
privacyPolicy.s12P2: The responsible party may opt out of non-essential communications when applicable.
privacyPolicy.s13P1: Rise Up Kids may update this Privacy Policy to reflect improvements, legal changes or evolution of the service. The update date will be revised at the top of the document.
privacyPolicy.s14P1: For questions about privacy or personal data:
